steps.title: Bracket the interrupter
steps.content: The phrase beginning with "which" is supplementary information about the models. Because the sentence already has a closing em dash before "cannot explain," the opening mark before "which" must match it.

steps.title: Match the punctuation
steps.content: B opens with a comma but closes with a dash. C gives no opening punctuation. D places the dash after "which," inside the interrupter. The remaining choice places the dash before the supplementary clause. The answer is A.
